goal: submit my preference ranking for the movies in the pool after movie adding has ended
benefit: my ranking influences the final selection
acceptance_criteria: Each user can rank all the movies in the pool (e.g., 1-5, with 1 as favorite and 5 as least).
The ranking is registered and displayed in the UI.

goal: automatically count the ranks and select the winning movie
benefit: the group’s choice is finalized without manual intervention
acceptance_criteria: When the ranking period ends, the system counts the ranks accurately.
The movie with the highest average ranking (lowest numerical rank count) is selected automatically.
The winning movie is clearly displayed.

goal: apply the tie-breaker rule when multiple movies receive the same average rank
acceptance_criteria: In a tie scenario, the tiebreaker of highest rank is applied.
The tie-breaker process is logged and documented.
The final decision is displayed to all group members.

benefit: understand how the group arrived at the final selection
acceptance_criteria: The results page shows the average ranking for each movie.
The selected movie is highlighted as the winner.

goal: validate that each ranking is for a valid movie in the pool
benefit: the integrity of the selection process is ensured
acceptance_criteria: Rankings submitted for movies not in the pool are not possible.
Appropriate error messages are shown for invalid rankings.
All valid rankings are logged with user ID and timestamp.
